gate_question: Does this exact current protocol, with current live state, allow an unprivileged attacker to extract funds or rewards beyond entitlement?

candidate.title_or_claim: Reentrancy via migrator callback during bonding-curve-to-DEX transition in swapExactInput
candidate.claimed_root_cause: No reentrancy guard on swapExactInput; if PORTAL_TRADE_V2 calls luanchToDEX before _setTokenStatus(DEX), the token status remains Tradable during the external migrator call, allowing a reentrant swapExactInput to route back to PORTAL_TRADE_V2 and buy at bonding-curve price after migration begins
candidate.claimed_impact: Attacker buys tokens at bonding-curve price after DEX migration is triggered, extracting value from the protocol reserve

live_preconditions.name: token_near_dexSupplyThresh
live_preconditions.observed_value: unknown — no event-derived token state available in live_context.json

live_preconditions.name: PORTAL_TRADE_V2_address
live_preconditions.observed_value: unknown — immutable address not readable from live_context.json; must be read from impl storage or constructor args

live_preconditions.name: PORTAL_TRADE_V2_CEI_ordering
live_preconditions.observed_value: unknown — PORTAL_TRADE_V2 source is not present in src/*.sol; the ordering of _setTokenStatus(DEX) vs luanchToDEX cannot be confirmed from indexed source
live_preconditions.command_if_missing: cast etherscan-source <PORTAL_TRADE_V2_address> --chain bsc OR decompile bytecode at that address to recover the buy/migration ordering

live_preconditions.name: migrator_callback_surface
live_preconditions.observed_value: unknown — migrator address not in live_context.json; whether it issues a uniswapV3MintCallback or BNB refund to an attacker-controlled address is unconfirmed
live_preconditions.command_if_missing: cast call 0xe2ce6ab80874fa9fa2aae65d277dd6b8e65c9de0 'getTokenV8Safe(address)' <token> to read migratorType, then resolve migrator address from PortalBase immutables

source_code_basis.why_it_matters: Entry point; no reentrancy guard; dispatches to PORTAL_TRADE_V2 via _delegateToImpl without any mutex

Routes to PORTAL_TRADE_V2 if status==Tradable; this is the only natural barrier against reentrant bonding-curve buys, and it fails if status has not yet been updated to DEX when the reentrant call arrives
Writes the DEX status to packed storage; if called after luanchToDEX (violating CEI), the status is still Tradable during the migrator's external call window
NatSpec confirms this is an external payable call that may be delegatecalled; it is the external call that opens the reentrancy window if invoked before _setTokenStatus(DEX)

No nonReentrant modifier, ReentrancyGuard, or equivalent mutex exists anywhere in src/*.sol; the only reentrancy protection in the repo is in lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable and lib/v3-core, which are not applied to the trade path

attacker_path.actor: unprivileged EOA controlling a receiver contract
attacker_inputs: params.inputAmount sized to push circulatingSupply >= dexSupplyThresh and trigger migration
call_sequence: 1. Attacker calls Portal.swapExactInput with threshold-crossing BNB buy
3. _delegateToImpl(PORTAL_TRADE_V2) executes buy, updates circulatingSupply, triggers migration
4. IF PORTAL_TRADE_V2 calls luanchToDEX BEFORE _setTokenStatus(DEX): migrator receives external call while status is still Tradable
5. Migrator issues callback to attacker-controlled address (uniswapV3MintCallback or BNB refund path)
7. _getSwapImplementation reads status==Tradable (not yet updated) -> returns PORTAL_TRADE_V2
8. Reentrant buy executes at bonding-curve price; DEX pool is unfunded so reserve/supply state is inconsistent
9. Outer call completes, _setTokenStatus(DEX) is written — but attacker already received tokens at pre-migration price
state_after: IF CEI violated: attacker holds tokens bought at bonding-curve price after migration began; reserve/supply accounting is inconsistent
IF CEI followed: reentrant call sees status==DEX or routes to PORTAL_DEX_ROUTER and fails on unfunded pool — no extraction

extraction_analysis.attacker_gain: Tokens purchased at bonding-curve price after migration is triggered, when those tokens should only be available at DEX price
extraction_analysis.victim_or_protocol_loss: Protocol reserve is drained below the amount needed to fund the DEX pool; other token holders and the protocol suffer the shortfall
extraction_analysis.why_gain_exceeds_entitlement: After migration is triggered, no bonding-curve trades should occur; the invariant is that circulatingSupply >= dexSupplyThresh means the bonding curve is closed. A reentrant buy violates this invariant and lets the attacker acquire tokens at a price lower than the DEX listing price.

setup: 1. Fork BSC at block 108382650 (latest captured block)
2. Resolve PORTAL_TRADE_V2 address from Portal impl immutables (cast storage or constructor args)

3. Identify a live token with circulatingSupply near dexSupplyThresh (query getTokenV8Safe for recent LaunchedToDEX events to find tokens that recently graduated, then replay with a token one step before graduation)
4. Deploy MockMigrator whose luanchToDEX re-enters Portal.swapExactInput before returning
5. If PORTAL_TRADE_V2 source is unavailable, decompile bytecode to confirm _setTokenStatus(DEX) vs luanchToDEX ordering
transaction_sequence: attacker.buy(threshold - 1 unit) to set up state
attacker.swapExactInput({inputToken: address(0), outputToken: token, inputAmount: threshold_crossing_amount}) from attacker contract
inside MockMigrator.luanchToDEX callback: attacker contract calls Portal.swapExactInput again with a small BNB buy
expected_assertions: IF CEI violated: assert reentrant swapExactInput succeeds and attacker receives tokens; assert token.status was still Tradable during reentrant call -> HIGH_CONFIDENCE_CANDIDATE
IF CEI followed: assert reentrant swapExactInput reverts (TokenAlreadyDEXed or routes to PORTAL_DEX_ROUTER and fails on unfunded pool) -> REJECT
local_proof_required.reject_if_assertion_fails: Test passes (reentrant buy succeeds at bonding-curve price) only if PORTAL_TRADE_V2 calls luanchToDEX before writing _setTokenStatus(DEX). If the reentrant call reverts in all branches, reject the candidate.

rejection_reason: Cannot promote beyond NEEDS_LOCAL_PROOF because the exact_code_path_exists gate is false: the PORTAL_TRADE_V2 implementation source is not present in src/*.sol and its internal ordering of _setTokenStatus(DEX) vs luanchToDEX cannot be confirmed from indexed source alone. The entire exploitability of this candidate depends on that ordering. Additionally, live_state_supports_preconditions is false because no live token near dexSupplyThresh has been identified from the available live_context.json. Both gaps must be closed by a BSC fork test before this candidate can be promoted.
